body.title: Add concept_links field to /sorted decisions and palace nodes
body.result: Added concept_links as Q4 in step 2.6 of /sorted and /decided. Decision record template updated with ## Concept Links section and concept_links field in palace metadata.
body.description:
Update /sorted (and /decided) step 2.6 to ask a fourth question: 'Which concepts does this decision assume? (C-xxx or none)'. Store as concept_links field in the decision palace node metadata alongside goal_link. Update the decision record template to include a '## Concept Links' section.

This closes the traceability loop: decisions link up to goals (why) and sideways to concepts (what the decision assumed about how things work). A future CC session can pull a decision and understand both what it was trying to achieve and what architectural model it relied on.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/sorted/SKILL.md, ~/.claude/skills/decided/SKILL.md, lab/design_docs/decisions/*.md template
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Skill text changes only. No retroactive backfill of existing decisions — too many, low value. New decisions only.
**Test plan:** no tests — validate by running /sorted on a small decision and confirming the resulting palace node has concept_links in metadata
